creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: miwi
Date: Tue May 21 05:47:45 2013
New Revision: 318642
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/318642

Log:
  - Update to 5.20120324
  
  PR:		178155
  Submitted by:	ports fury

Deleted:
  head/devel/p5-Cdk/files/patch-Makefile.PL
Modified:
  head/devel/p5-Cdk/Makefile   (contents, props changed)
  head/devel/p5-Cdk/distinfo   (contents, props changed)
  head/devel/p5-Cdk/pkg-descr   (contents, props changed)
  head/devel/p5-Cdk/pkg-plist   (contents, props changed)

Modified: head/devel/p5-Cdk/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/p5-Cdk/Makefile	Tue May 21 05:43:22 2013	(r318641)
+++ head/devel/p5-Cdk/Makefile	Tue May 21 05:47:45 2013	(r318642)
@@ -2,24 +2,26 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	Cdk
-PORTVERSION=	4.9.10
-PORTREVISION=	1
+PORTVERSION=	5.20120324
 CATEGORIES=	devel perl5
 MASTER_SITES=	ftp://dickey.his.com/cdk/
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
-DISTNAME=	cdk-perl-20031210
+DISTNAME=	cdk-perl-${PORTVERSION:C,^[0-9]\.,,}
 EXTRACT_SUFX=	.tgz
 
 MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
 COMMENT=	Perl5 module for Curses Development Kit
 
-LIB_DEPENDS=	cdk.5:${PORTSDIR}/devel/cdk
+LICENSE=	BSD
+LICENSE_FILE=	${WRKSRC}/COPYING
 
-BROKEN=	does not build
+LIB_DEPENDS=	cdk:${PORTSDIR}/devel/cdk
 
-PERL_CONFIGURE=	yes
+USE_PERL5=	yes
+GNU_CONFIGURE=	yes
+INSTALL_TARGET=	pure_install
 
-post-patch:
-	${REINPLACE_CMD} 's,%%LOCALBASE%%,${LOCALBASE},g' ${WRKSRC}/Makefile.PL
+CPPFLAGS+=	-I${LOCALBASE}/include
+LDFLAGS+=	-L${LOCALBASE}/lib
 
 .include <bsd.port.mk>
